body:
Amara, just following up on our call last week — I wanted to make sure you saw the cap table note I flagged for [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) before the term sheet goes out. As we discussed, Petrov Capital is coming in at 8% on the seed, which I know is a touch above what you'd penciled in, but I think it reflects the conviction we have here given the market timing. The round is sizing at $4.2M total, so the math still works cleanly for your allocation if you're anchoring around the 12% founder dilution threshold you mentioned. Let me know if you want to hop on a quick call before EOD Friday to align on the final numbers — I'd rather get ahead of any surprises before the founders see the sheet.

Anna
